rulings.Case Title: NANCY EASTHAM et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 2, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Mr. Cole¿s declaration and the depositions of Mr. McLean and Mr. Pantaleoni create a triable issue whether Mr. Eastham was exposed to original asbestos-containing packing from Crane Co. valves. Mr. Cohen¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether the original asbestos-containing packing attributable to defendant was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to Mr. Eastham¿s asbestos-related illness. The objections to the pertinent portions of the declarations of Mr. Cole and Mr. Cohen and the depositions of Mr. McLean and Mr. Pantaleoni are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCCOLLISTER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 2, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objection to plaintiff¿s Exhibit E is sustained. = (220/HEK)
